title: Donor Acceptance Criteria for TMC Florida/Zurich HuBMAP Inclusion
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"fhato","text":"This document outlines the required criteria for inclusion for donors of thymus, lymph nodes and spleen in the HuBMAP project.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: A copy of the complete recovery checklist must be provided
BMI must be in keeping with CDC published growth charts 5th to 95th percentile
Donor must be less than seven days on ventilator
Donor tissue must be received within 24 hours of recovery
Bacterial or viral meningitis or MRSA in any culture
Observable infarction, rupture, deflation or gross abnormality
Must receive at least 50% of the intact spleen, including hilum.
Must receive at least 4 intact lymph nodes
Must be under the age of 50 to permit for adequate lymphoid tissue presence
Any active known infections including SARS-Cov-2
creator: Marda Jorgensen
